heading: Company Orders
intro: Let your colleagues and workplace bloom with beauty and joy. Order locally from Boulevardens Blomster and celebrate the good moments with style and elegance.
deliveryNote: Free delivery and flower card with text applies only to businesses and their employees in Taastrup municipality, with delivery between 07-09 on weekdays.
contactNote: For larger orders and other enquiries, please contact us at:

bouquets.name: Just Because...
bouquets.description: Spontaneous joy with flowers for no other reason than to bring a smile and warmth to someone special.

bouquets.name: Welcome Back!
bouquets.description: A warm welcome with flowers to celebrate the return and spread joy together.

bouquets.name: Congratulations!
bouquets.description: Celebrate every happy milestone with our festive bouquets that express happiness and excitement.

bouquets.name: Love
bouquets.description: Our love bouquets radiate passion and devotion, perfect for expressing your heartfelt feelings.

bouquets.name: Seasonal Flowers - Compact
bouquets.description: Colourful seasonal flowers that are a delight for every occasion. We ensure beauty in a compact format.

bouquets.name: Seasonal Flowers - Airy
bouquets.description: Colourful seasonal flowers that are a delight for every occasion. We ensure beauty in a tall, airy format.

form.cardTextLabel: Optional: Add text for card (free - max 50 words)
form.companyCodeLabel: Company code (contact us if you don't have one)
form.invoiceEmailLabel: If Invoice selected, please enter company email.
form.confirmationNote: You will receive an email confirmation. For invoice orders we send payment details manually.
form.successBody: We have received your order and will send a confirmation by email.
form.cancelledBody: You can review the order and try the payment again.
